Package neqsim.process.chemistry

Class ProductionChemical

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.chemistry.ProductionChemical
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ProductionChemical extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a production chemical used in oil and gas operations.

A production chemical is characterised by its type (function), active ingredient family (chemistry), concentration of the active ingredient, ionic nature, pH, and a temperature stability range. These properties drive compatibility evaluation against other chemicals and the produced fluid (water, oil, gas, solids) by ChemicalCompatibilityAssessor.

Use the static factory methods (e.g. scaleInhibitor(String, double), corrosionInhibitor(String, double)) for typical defaults. The instance can be tuned with the setters before evaluation.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

  • Method Details

    • scaleInhibitor

      public static ProductionChemical scaleInhibitor(String name, double dosagePpm)
      Creates a phosphonate-based scale inhibitor with default properties.
      Parameters:
      name - commercial name
      dosagePpm - dose in ppm
      Returns:
      configured ProductionChemical

    • corrosionInhibitor

      public static ProductionChemical corrosionInhibitor(String name, double dosagePpm)
      Creates an imidazoline-based corrosion inhibitor with default properties.
      Parameters:
      name - commercial name
      dosagePpm - dose in ppm
      Returns:
      configured ProductionChemical

    • thermodynamicHydrateInhibitor

      public static ProductionChemical thermodynamicHydrateInhibitor(String name, double dosagePpm)
      Creates a thermodynamic hydrate inhibitor (MEG by default).
      Parameters:
      name - commercial name
      dosagePpm - dose in ppm (for trace) — for bulk MEG injection use dosagePpm = 0 and set the actual mass flow on the injection stream
      Returns:
      configured ProductionChemical

    • h2sScavenger

      public static ProductionChemical h2sScavenger(String name, double dosagePpm)
      Creates a triazine-based H2S scavenger.
      Parameters:
      name - commercial name
      dosagePpm - dose in ppm
      Returns:
      configured ProductionChemical

    • acid

      public static ProductionChemical acid(String name, double activeWtPct)
      Creates a mineral acid for stimulation / cleaning (HCl by default).
      Parameters:
      name - commercial name
      activeWtPct - acid concentration in wt%
      Returns:
      configured ProductionChemical

      Returns:
